products.description: Argentina soccer jersey with Climacool+ technology for a cool and focused performance. The Argentina 26 Home Messi Authentic Jersey unites soccer heritage with forward-thinking design. Marking the first appearance of Argentina’s third World Cup winners’ star, it honors the team’s legacy and fearless identity. Crafted in knit jacquard with a slim, performance fit, it’s built to move with precision.
products.fabricDetails:
• Premium Imported Player Edition
• Main Material: 100% Polyester (100% Recycled)
• CLIMACOOL+ technology
• Sweat-wicking & Quick drying
